sentences.text: We walked across the street.
The cat ran across the garden.
He swam across the river.
Actions speak louder than words.
We need to take action now.
I like watching action movies.
Swimming is my favorite summer activity.
There are many activities for kids here.
School activities start at 4 PM.
He is a very famous Hollywood actor.
The actor forgot his lines on stage.
I want to be an actor when I grow up.
The actress wore a beautiful red dress.
She is a talented young actress.
The actress played the role of a queen.
The suggestion will be added to the proposal.
He adds some e-books onto the database from time to time
Can you give me some advice?
My teacher gave me good advice today.
Listen to your parents' advice.
Don't be afraid of the dark.
She is afraid of big dogs.
Are you afraid of spiders?
I agree with your plan.
Do you agree with me?
They finally agreed on a price.
I love the fresh air in the morning.
Open the window for some fresh air.
The air is cold today.
We are going to the airport now.
The airport is far from the city.
He works at the international airport.
My mom was angry because I was late.
Don't be angry with me.
He looked very angry this morning.
Does anyone have a pen?
Anyone can join the club.
I didn't see anyone I knew at the party.
I live in a small apartment in Tsuen Wan.
Her apartment is on the fifth floor.
They are looking for a new apartment.
An apple a day keeps the doctor away.
I like to eat a red apple for breakfast.
She is peeling an apple.
My birthday is in April.
April is the fourth month of the year.
It often rains in April.
The earth goes around the sun.
We walked around the lake.
Is there a bank around here?
What time does the train arrive?
We arrived at the airport early.
She arrived home late last night.
I love studying art at school.
Do you like modern art?
She is very good at art.
I read an interesting article today.
He wrote an article for the newspaper.
Did you see the article about the game?
She is a very talented artist.
The artist painted a beautiful sunset.
He wants to become a professional artist.
August is the hottest month here.
We went to Japan last August.
School starts in late August.
I love the cool weather in autumn.
The leaves change color in autumn.
Autumn is my favorite season.
Go away! I am busy.
The bird flew away.
Put your toys away.
He kicked the ball across the field.
Throw the ball to me!
The children are playing with a ball.
My brother plays in a rock band.
The band is playing my favorite song.
I want to start a band with my friends.
I like to take a warm bath before bed.
The baby is having a bath in the tub.
I need to give the dog a bath.
May I use your bathroom?
The bathroom is at the end of the hall.
I need to clean the bathroom today.
Let's go to the beach this weekend.
I like walking on the beach at sunset.
The children are building a sandcastle on the beach.
It's time to go to bed.
I like to read in bed.
The bed is very soft and comfortable.
My bedroom is on the second floor.
I share a bedroom with my sister.
She is cleaning her bedroom now.
He likes to drink a cold beer after work.
Would you like another beer?
This beer is from Germany.
The cat is hiding behind the sofa.
The sun went behind a cloud.
Who is that standing behind you?
The cat is hiding behind the sofa.
The sun went behind a cloud.
Who is that standing behind you?
The shop is between the bank and the pharmacy.
I am sitting between Tom and Mary.
What happened between them?
I go to school by bicycle every day.
He is learning how to ride a bicycle.
My bicycle has a small bell.
A small bird is singing in the tree.
Look at that beautiful blue bird!
Birds can fly high in the sky.
When is your birthday?
Happy birthday to you!
I am having a party for my birthday.
She is wearing a black dress.
My car is black.
He has short black hair.
She writes a travel blog.
I read your latest blog post today.
He started a blog about cooking.
The sky is clear and blue today.
She has beautiful blue eyes.
He is wearing a blue shirt.
We took a boat across the lake.
The boat is sailing on the river.
He owns a small fishing boat.
Exercise is good for your body.
The human body is amazing.
He has a very strong body.
Can I have a bottle of water?
The baby is drinking from a bottle.
She broke a glass bottle.
The toys are in the big box.
He opened the gift box.
I need a cardboard box for moving.
She went to the cinema with her boyfriend.
Is he your boyfriend?
Her boyfriend works as a computer programmer.
I usually have bread and eggs for breakfast.
This bread is fresh and warm.
Would you like a slice of bread?
Be careful not to break the glass.
Let's take a ten-minute break.
Did you break your phone screen?
What did you have for breakfast?
I never skip breakfast.
Breakfast is the most important meal of the day.
The dog has brown fur.
She is wearing a brown jacket.
He has dark brown eyes.
He runs a successful clothing business.
I'm here on business, not for a holiday.
Starting a new business is risky.
I am very busy preparing for the test.
The streets are always busy in the evening.
She has a busy schedule today.
I put some butter on my toast.
Keep the butter in the fridge.
Do you want butter or jam on your bread?
We swim in the sea every summer.
